---
title: "Team"
toc: false
listing:
  id: team-listing
  contents: 
    - "./team/*.qmd"
    - "!./team/*de.qmd"
  grid-columns: 2
  template: ejs/team-listing.ejs
  grid-item-border: false
  field-display-names:
    title: "Name"
    subtitle: "Position"
    skills: "Skills"
---

Click on each team members profile for further information.

:::{#team-listing}
:::
